topic_coverage.delegation_scope: frontend/src/pages/PlanningPage.tsx; frontend/src/pages/planSelector.ts; GET /api/v1/plans; DELETE /api/v1/plans/:id; BUG-0022/Q0031 release notes
topic_coverage.delegation_rationale: Live probe 2026-06-13: localhost:18080 has 1 active plan 'test' — isDeleteDisabled returns true by design. Q0031 resolveDisplayedPlanId fix may be deployed after today's rebuild but BM untestable with single plan. Operator report may be sole-plan UX gap or omniflow without FRONTEND_DEPLOY.

topic_coverage.quoted_user_text: BUG-0022 Q0031 released with FRONTEND_DEPLOY deferred; DEC-0082 blocks deleting globally active plan — sole-plan operators may have no workaround unless UX explains create-second-plan path

Repro with 2+ plans: select non-active in dropdown → Delete enabled (BM). Sole plan: tooltip explains why disabled or offers delete-with-deactivate flow (BS). Browser smoke on /planning after FRONTEND_DEPLOY
Operator can delete a non-active plan when 2+ exist, or understand sole-plan constraint with clear UI copy — not permanently grayed Delete with no explanation

decomposition.rationale: Live operator regression post-BUG-0022/Q0031 — delete control still perceived broken; discovery splits sole-plan UX (BS) vs multi-plan BM regression vs undeployed frontend.
alternatives_considered: Reopen BUG-0022 — rejected (DONE with Q0031; new live report gets fresh BUG-0024 trace)
